violations.text: Several food items in self-service area were observed lacking labels with the common name of the food and major allergens. Foods located in self-service areas need: 1. the common name of the food 2. a list of ingredients if made with 2 or more ingredients (or they can have a sign saying "ingredients available upon request") 3. a major food allergen associated with the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026
Establishment is lacking allergy warning for consumers in front grab and go area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Pans, colander, and plastic tubs were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen and ware washing area is covered with material that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application was handed to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
A fly trap was observed hanging above a food storage area. Glue fly traps shall not be used in food prep/storage areas to prevent the risk of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
